free_text: The 238U targets were prepared by vacuum evaporation
of UF4 on 12 C foils of 30 ug/cm2.
The 232Th targets were made by electrodeposition from
an organic solution on 12C foils of 30 ug/cm2
A position sensitive detector of 3 cm length was
and B.M.Jyrwa,North Eastern Hill University, Meghalaya
